primary_user: project-based solo operator or micro-studio serving multiple clients
buyer_or_user: the operator is the buyer; the client may participate as an external guest
core_scene: a client message changes an existing commercial or delivery fact, and the operator must understand and propagate its impact across work state

skip_rules.reason: explicitly out of scope for the current competition entry
deferred until scene value, commercial potential, and innovation are evidence-backed
